message:
fix(fcp-sandbox): align socket_addr_allowed test with raw socket policy tightening

The raw_socket_host_policy audit fix correctly requires explicit IP
allowlists for raw socket access (empty host_allow + empty ip_allow
→ Disabled). Update test_socket_addr_allowed_tcp_connect to use an
explicit ip_allow entry matching the test address.

Verified: 547/547 fcp-sandbox lib tests pass, 453 protocol, 1068 mesh,
3865 core, 449 cbor all clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3024,10 +3024,13 @@ mod tests {
 
     #[test]
     fn test_socket_addr_allowed_tcp_connect() {
+        // Must have explicit IP allowlist for raw socket access per
+        // raw_socket_host_policy security tightening (empty host_allow +
+        // empty ip_allow → Disabled).
         let constraints = NetworkConstraints {
             host_allow: vec![],
             port_allow: vec![443, 8080],
-            ip_allow: vec![],
+            ip_allow: vec!["1.2.3.4".parse().unwrap()],
             cidr_deny: vec![],
             deny_localhost: false,
             deny_private_ranges: false,
